violations.description: Serial mode prevents worker-level parallelism for this suite.
violations.suggestion: Refactor fixture/state model for parallel-safe execution and remove serial mode.

violations.description: Each case performs full UI login and multiple navigations, increasing runtime.
violations.suggestion: Consider storage-state/session reuse for ux-r3 E2E flows.

violations.description: Multiple before/after detail fetches and webhook calls per case increase execution time.
violations.suggestion: Consolidate baseline/detail checks where possible without losing assertion value.

violations.description: Suite does not opt into parallel mode and can likely be partially parallelized after data isolation updates.
violations.suggestion: Enable parallel execution for independent AC-focused cases once fixtures are isolated.

slow_tests: P1 lifecycle invariants case due multiple webhook/detail cycles

recommendations: Remove serial execution constraint after isolation refactor.
Reuse authenticated storage state for E2E where feasible.
Reduce repeated webhook setup via shared helper and parameterized cases.
summary: Performance is acceptable but constrained by serial API execution and repeated setup.
